meta.title: Workflow State Crosswalk — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2

mapping_status_legend.ONE_TO_MANY: One Gold state maps to multiple V2 states
mapping_status_legend.MANY_TO_ONE: Multiple Gold states collapse into one V2 state
mapping_status_legend.PARTIAL_MATCH: Partial overlap, significant gaps on both sides
mapping_status_legend.EXTENSION_REQUIRED: No V2 equivalent; new state machine needed
mapping_status_legend.HUMAN_DECISION_REQUIRED: Cannot auto-resolve; human architect decision needed

transitions.guard: Coherence, conformity, uniqueness, availability checks pass
End of lease, cancellation, withdrawal of compromise
Owner request, obsolescence, archival rules reached

nba_per_state.Disponible: Suggest price reduction, recommend new photos, broaden matching, propose premium visibility

guards.can_publish: title, city, price_min/max required, not deleted

v2.events: Generic Event model (kind, payload) — no property-specific audit events

state_mapping.rationale: Draft covers creation but lacks qualification sub-states
Project creation maps to dossier creation
Qualification is a step in the journey
Visit step exists but no visit state machine
Negotiation step exists but no negotiation state machine

gold.sla: Immediate — matching is computed synchronously upon trigger
gold.nba: Matching itself IS the NBA for a dossier. Once matching completes, NBA transitions to PRESENT_PROPERTY.

state_mapping.rationale: No matching engine or state machine exists

gold.guard: Double consent is MANDATORY — demandeur interested AND holder favorable. No exceptions.
gold.sla: Holder response time based on property type
gold.interlocutor_shift: After Mise en Relation, interlocutor changes from LAWIM AI to Propriétaire/Agence/Introduceur

v2.partial_via: project step:visit (label only, no state machine)

state_mapping.rationale: No visit entity or state machine

transitions.guard: Max delay, party withdrawal, property unavailable

gold.sla: Follow-up intervals J1, J7, J30, J90
indicators: Average gap between initial and final price

state_mapping.rationale: Gold separates transaction from negotiation end

transitions.guard: Agreement exists, property available, parties confirm
Payment abandoned, docs impossible, party withdrawal

gold.revenue_rule: LAWIM never deducts a percentage from transactions — revenue comes exclusively from platform services

transitions.guard: Objective achieved, abandoned, admin decision; no pending items

gold.principle: No business data is ever deleted in LAWIM

v2.status: Single archive level, no retention policies, no auto-archival

gold.mediator_role: Listen, facilitate, explain procedures, seek amicable solution, document exchanges. NEVER: impose decision, represent a party, modify dossier history, render legal judgment.

automatic_evolution_paths: Agent → Creation of validated agency → Responsable d'agence

v2.partial_via: Prisma User model with role string (free text), no lifecycle state machine

state_mapping.rationale: Basic user created, no lifecycle tracking

gold.minimum_effective: 3 active agents for fully operational status

v2.partial_via: Prisma Organization model (id, name, slug, kind, city), kind is free string, no lifecycle states

state_mapping.rationale: Organization model exists but no validation/activation workflow

gold.member_departure_rules: Remove org permissions, keep personal history and audit traces, transfer open dossiers per defined rules, user account remains active

gold.sie_integration: Reference code generation is a SIE (Système d'Information Externalisé) call

gold.attribution_model: Last-touch (final conversion step before Historisation is the attributed source)

gold.orchestration_notes: Top-level orchestrator spanning entire client journey. Delegates to sub-workflows. States run in parallel for Visit, Negotiation, Transaction. On failure: retry, skip to rematching, or close.

v2.partial_via: distributed across project (status+steps), property, conversation — no orchestrator

sla_monitoring.gold: Per-entity, per-state SLA registry with breach detection

health_scoring.gold: Property Health Score, Dossier Health SLA

rematching.gold: Automatic on refusal, visit failure, negotiation failure

interlocutor_shift.gold: AI → Human after Mise en Relation

lead_scoring.gold: Base + boosters - penalties = numeric score → class

sie_integration.gold: Reference code, campaign, actor, property association

property.gold: 13 SLA rules + per property type rotation (24h→1095d)

sla_monitoring_infrastructure.registry: Configurable thresholds per entity type/state/property type
sla_monitoring_infrastructure.market_rotation: 14 property types with specific rotation durations
constitutional_rules: No active dossier, no published property, no transaction shall remain without action beyond the applicable SLA
If exceeded, LAWIM MUST trigger an appropriate action
Inaction is considered an operational anomaly
A workflow without a next action is considered defective

nba_comparison.v2_capability: derive_next_actions() lists pending steps only — no NBA engine

critical.impact: Platform cannot algorithmically match demandeurs with properties
Cannot schedule, confirm, track or follow up on visits
Cannot score, classify, or route leads
No master workflow to coordinate sub-workflows

high.impact: Cannot handle claims, fraud, or disputes
No reference code generation or external system integration
Missing qualification, validation, matching, reactivation states
Missing presentation, wait states, double consent
No structured agent invitation and validation

medium.impact: Cannot track user intent evolution or trust score
No structured agency creation and validation
